scenes.description: Bae introducing the [ReCOLOR]Rubber Mat with illustration by Mika Pikazo.
Bae introducing the Li'l Plushie Shed (Pouch).
Bae introducing her first ASMR Voice Pack 'Forever Your Bae'.
Bae explaining the Set Purchase Bonuses (Postcard & Bonus Voice).
Bae leaves the stage briefly to put on her jacket.
Bae returns wearing her jacket and gives a closing MC talk about the live show.
